item.title: Feed my cats with me 🤍 This was last night’s dinner featuring lots of quail goodies ✨ This meal was also around 80 kcals! Our feeding schedule 🕐 8am - Auto feeder freeze dried raw OR wet food (if I’m awake 😴) 12pm - Wet or raw meal 4pm - Auto feeder fre

item.title: ⭐️Pro tip ⭐️: When you gently and thoughtfully introduce kittens to new experiences 😽, the more likely they are to accept them later in life 😺 ~samantha #kittentips #kittenbehavior #catbehavior #kittentraining #cattraining #cattips #SaveThemAll
item.description: By @bestfriendsanimalsociety: ⭐️Pro tip ⭐️: When you gently and thoughtfully introduce kittens to new experiences 😽, the more likely they are to accept them later in life 😺 ~samantha #kittentips #kittenbehavior #catbehavior #kittentraining #cattraining #cattips #SaveThemAll
